articles.title: I have a question about season tickets.

articles.summary: Hello, hope all is well. We've been finally blessed with the season ticket email after a long wait. The e-mail has instructions on the process but I wanted to clear up something regarding payment (couldn't find the answer in the FAQs). 1.) I'm reading conflicting reports of having to pay in full (4 tickets so looking at least 40k up front for the 300 section) vs being allowed to pay in installments.
